---
id: search-sections
title: "Search agreement sections"
description: "Searches sections using structured filters and taxonomy IDs. For list filters, repeat query keys (for example `year=2023&year=2024`)."
sidebar_label: "Search agreement sections"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/pandects/pandects-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Search agreement sections"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/search"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Searches sections using structured filters and taxonomy IDs. For list filters, repeat query keys (for example `year=2023&year=2024`).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
